mapper.select: SELECT id, name, icon, sort_order FROM product_category ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT id, name, category_id, price, unit, stock, image_url, description, bar_code, discount, is_hot, tags, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, category_id, price, unit, stock, image_url, description, bar_code, discount, is_hot, tags, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE is_hot = 1 AND status = 'ONSHELF' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(id, name, category_id, price, unit, stock, image_url, description, bar_code, discount, is_hot, tags, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{barCode}, #{discount}, #{isHot}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
